Exhibition Room

Hostas

Broad blue-green leaves anchor the garden's shaded beds, rising here alongside martagon lilies, delphiniums and daylilies gathered from the garden and from Italy.

No. 8-1
Hostas and Martagon Lilies
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas
No. 8-2
Hostas on Pink
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas
No. 8-3

Nona Dronova · 2020 · Oil on canvas
No. 8-4

Nona Dronova · 2019 · Oil on canvas
No. 8-5
Daylilies, Italy
Nona Dronova · 2019 · Oil on canvas
No. 8-6
Blue Hostas and Yellow Daylilies
Nona Dronova · 2019 · Oil on canvas
The Garden as Art

A digital archive of artistic heritage, dedicated to the philosophy of the garden, contemporary art, and the creation of a harmonious living space.
